questions.text: Did you feel at peace today?
Are you proud of who you're becoming?
Did you listen to your intuition recently?
Is there something you need to forgive yourself for?
Are you being honest with yourself?
Did you make time for silence today?
Are you holding onto something you should let go?
Did you feel grateful for something small?
Are you where you thought you'd be at this point in life?
Did you choose kindness over being right?
Is your heart lighter than it was yesterday?
Did you do something that scared you?
Have you been avoiding a truth about yourself?
Did you spend time with your thoughts today?
Are you living with intention?
Have you outgrown a version of yourself recently?
Did you notice something beautiful that others missed?
Are you carrying a burden that isn't yours to carry?
Did you honor a boundary today?
Have you been gentle with yourself lately?
Is there a wound you keep reopening?
Did you feel truly seen by someone today?
Are you becoming more yourself or less?
Have you sat with an uncomfortable emotion recently?
Did you give yourself permission to feel today?
Is your mind quieter than it was a year ago?
Did you find a calm moment in the middle of a busy day?
Can you sit with yourself without reaching for a distraction?
Do you feel settled in your life right now?
Was there a moment today when nothing felt urgent?
Have you stopped fighting a battle that was never yours?
Is there ease in your body when you think about tomorrow?
Did you breathe slowly on purpose at some point today?
Are you closer to yourself than you were last year?
Would the younger you recognize who you are now?
Is there a version of you waiting for permission to exist?
Do you like the direction you're quietly heading?
Have you noticed yourself changing in a way no one else has?
Have you settled before you were finished?
Did you act like the person you want to be today?
Did your gut tell you something today that you ignored?
Do you trust your first instinct?
Have you second-guessed yourself out of something good?
Is there a quiet knowing you've been talking yourself out of?
Can you tell the difference between fear and intuition?
Did you follow a hunch recently?
Does your body know things before your mind catches up?
Is there an apology you're still waiting for?
Have you forgiven someone who never said sorry?
Would you forgive a friend for the things you blame yourself for?
Are you softer on others than you are on yourself?
Did you let a small grievance go today?
Is there a grudge that's grown heavier than the hurt itself?
Have you made peace with a past mistake this year?
Did you say what you actually meant today?
Do you soften your opinions to keep the peace?
Have you told yourself a comforting story that isn't quite true?
Did you say 'fine' this week when it wasn't true?
Can you admit when you want something?
Are your reasons the real reasons?
Were you honest with someone even when it was awkward?
Did you let yourself do nothing today, even briefly?
Can you be still without feeling guilty?
Have you watched the sky for no reason lately?
Is quiet comfortable for you?
Did you pause before reacting at any point today?
Do you give your thoughts room to finish?
Was there a moment this week when time slowed down?
Is there a plan you're holding too tightly?
Have you released an expectation that kept disappointing you?
Could you let an old story about yourself end?
Did you put something down today that wasn't worth carrying?
Are you keeping something only because you've kept it so long?
Would your days feel lighter if you stopped keeping score?
Is there a goodbye you've been postponing?
Was the ordinary enough for you today?
Are you thankful for a hard thing that taught you something?
Did you thank someone silently today?
Do you notice what's working more than what's broken?
Was there a moment today you'd want to keep?
Have you appreciated your own effort lately?
Is there an old kindness you still think about?
Do you think today's worry will matter in five years?
Does zooming out help when the day feels heavy?
Do your problems shrink when you step outside?
Are you measuring your life with someone else's ruler?
Has a hard chapter of yours ever turned into a beginning?
Can you see how far you've come?
Would your troubles look smaller through a stranger's eyes?
Were you kind to yourself in a small way today?
Did you soften toward someone who was struggling?
Did you offer warmth without expecting anything back?
Have you been patient with someone who tested you this week?
Did you let someone off the hook today?
Is your inner voice gentler than it used to be?
Would you be friends with someone who spoke to you the way you speak to yourself?
Did you name what you were feeling today?
Can you cry without apologizing for it?
Do you let joy in as easily as worry?
Have you felt something fully this week instead of pushing it down?
Is there a feeling waiting for you to finally feel it?
Has a small thing moved you recently?
Are you tired in a way that rest doesn't reach?
Are you afraid of being ordinary?
Is fear making a decision for you right now?
Did you name a fear out loud recently?
Have you mistaken comfort for safety?
Did worry steal a moment from you today?
Are you scared of wanting too much?
Would you still choose the safe path if no one was watching?
Is there a conversation you keep rehearsing but never having?
Do you know what you actually want right now?
Have you admitted to yourself what isn't working?
Can you hear a hard truth without flinching?
Is there something true you're not ready to say out loud?
Did you stop pretending about something recently?
Do your actions match the story you tell about yourself?
Do you enjoy your own company?
Were you alone today without filling the silence?
Does being alone feel like rest to you?
Have you taken yourself somewhere alone recently?
Can you tell loneliness apart from solitude?
Do you need more alone time than you're getting?
Were you okay with having no plans this week?
Did you choose how today went, even a little?
Are your days adding up to the life you want?
Did you start your morning on purpose?
Do you say yes out of habit?
Is your time going where you say it matters?
Have you decided what this season of your life is for?
Would you live today the same way if you got it again?
Have you changed your mind about something important this year?
Are you still teachable?
Has a mistake taught you something recently?
Is the hard thing you're in shaping you into someone steadier?
Were you a beginner at something recently?
Do you give yourself credit for invisible progress?
Are you growing in a direction you chose?
Did you catch the light doing something lovely today?
Have you slowed down for something beautiful this week?
Do you let small beauty interrupt your day?
Did a piece of music reach you recently?
Can you find beauty in your ordinary routine?
Was the world quietly beautiful at some point today?
Have you noticed your own life being beautiful lately?
Did you say no without explaining yourself?
Is there a line you let people cross too often?
Do you rest before you're forced to?
Have you protected your time this week?
Can you disappoint someone without abandoning yourself?
Did you keep a promise to yourself today?
Are you available to everyone except yourself?
Did you lower the bar for yourself on a hard day?
Are you in a season that calls for softness?
Did you speak to yourself kindly after a mistake today?
Can you be soft without feeling weak?
Have you given yourself a slow morning recently?
Do you demand more of yourself on days when you have less?
Did anything get to be easy today?
Is an old hurt still steering your choices?
Is a tender spot finally starting to heal?
Do certain words still sting more than they should?
Is there a memory you can hold more gently now?
Have you stopped pressing on a bruise just to check it still hurts?
Has an old ache surfaced and passed on its own this week?
Are you healing in ways nobody can see yet?
Did you reach out to someone first today?
Do you let people see the unpolished version of you?
Is there someone you miss but haven't told?
Have you felt understood without explaining yourself lately?
Did you really listen to someone today?
Are you lonely in a room full of people sometimes?
Would the people close to you say they really know you?
Did you stay in an awkward moment instead of escaping it?
Can you let a question stay unanswered?
Have you grown from something you'd never want to repeat?
Do you reach for your phone the second you feel uneasy?
Did you tolerate not knowing today?
Is there a tension you're finally ready to face?
Were you okay being bad at something recently?
Have you let yourself want what you actually want?
Did you take up space today without apologizing?
Can you rest before everything is finished?
Do you wait for someone to tell you it's okay?
Did you allow yourself a small joy today?
Have you given yourself the okay to change your mind?
Do you let yourself be unfinished?
Do you know who you are when no one needs you?
Are you the same person in every room?
Have you kept a part of yourself the world tried to edit?
Is the role you play starting to feel like a costume?
Do you like yourself without your achievements?
Did you feel like yourself today?
Are there parts of you only you have ever met?
Did you look back on this week with honest eyes?
Do you notice your own patterns repeating?
Have you asked yourself why you reacted that way recently?
Is there a lesson this year keeps trying to teach you?
Did you catch yourself mid-habit today?
Can you watch your thoughts without believing every one?
Have you checked in with yourself about how you're really doing?
Can you accept the things this year refused to change?
Could you love a flaw you used to fight?
Are you done arguing with the past?
Did you accept help without feeling smaller for it?
Can you let today be enough?
Is there a no you've finally accepted?
Have you stopped waiting for a different ending?
Did you loosen your grip on an outcome today?
Can you trust what you can't control?
Have you stopped forcing something that wants to unfold slowly?
Is there a current you could stop swimming against?
Have you let someone carry part of the load this week?
Would it be okay if things didn't go to plan tomorrow?
Have you handed back a problem you were never meant to fix?
Do you know what matters most to you right now?
Has a fog lifted on something this week?
Can you name the thing that's been draining you?
Is your next step clearer than it was a month ago?
Have you written your thoughts down lately to see them clearly?
Do you know what you'd keep if you had to simplify your life?
Did stepping away from a problem bring an answer recently?
Is there a part of yourself you keep in the dark?
Do you judge in others what you hide in yourself?
Have you met the version of you that shows up when you're exhausted?
Can you admit envy when it visits?
Is there a feeling you pretend you've outgrown?
Did your harsher side show up today?
Do you know what your anger is protecting?
Are you spending your time like it's precious?
Did you treat today like it counted?
Is there something you'd regret never trying?
Do you think about what you'll be remembered for?
Have you told the people who matter what they mean to you?
Does knowing life is short make you gentler?
Are you saving your best for a someday that may never come?
Did you admit you were wrong recently?
Can you be corrected without crumbling?
Have you asked a question you were embarrassed not to know?
Do you let others teach you things you thought you knew?
Did you give credit away easily this week?
Are you okay not being the most interesting person in the room?
Have you laughed at yourself kindly lately?
Did you speak up when staying quiet was easier?
Have you done one small brave thing this week?
Would you start over if you knew it was right?
Is there a leap you keep walking up to the edge of?
Did you ask for what you needed today?
Can you stand by an unpopular choice you believe in?
Have you faced something this month instead of going around it?
